name: Sixty-Four

sheet.name: Sixty-Four
sheet.background_story: The soul of Sixty-Four is a tale from antiquity. Legend says Sixty-Four, the wandering Necromancer, was among those most loyal to Agora, before something terrible happened. Some say they’ve seen Sixty-Four wandering the swamps, after the hour of the serpent, others say Sixty-Four is just a myth; to scare travelers on the road and that the foul art of Necromancy Magic has long been lost to time.

description: The soul of Sixty-Four is a tale from antiquity. Legend says Sixty-Four, the wandering Necromancer, was among those most loyal to Agora, before something terrible happened. Some say they’ve seen Sixty-Four wandering the swamps, after the hour of the serpent, others say Sixty-Four is just a myth; to scare travelers on the road and that the foul art of Necromancy Magic has long been lost to time.
